approach: Option A — regex/keyword declarative claim detection

regexSignalCheck.assessment: Positive correlation with chapter length — signal is plausible

note: Counts are approximate — regex catches formal present-tense definitional claims, spatial, obligation, commitment, and possessive patterns. May miss implied facts; not a precision count.
harnessClaim: planning-beats floor: >=6 facts/chapter in establishedFacts array
assessmentRationale: Cross-book mean=5.58, median=5; harness floor=6. Floor is 'at' the corpus distribution.
